title: Amanai trace wire format v1
description: A recorded trace: the JSON array emitted by `[e.to_dict() for e in collect_trace()]` (Python) / `trace.map(traceEventToJSON)` (TypeScript), consumed by `amanai test` and sent as the `events` array in Monitor payloads. Consumers MUST tolerate additional fields (additive evolution); removals or type changes require a v2.

id.description: Unique event id (`evt-` + 32 hex). Empty string on traces recorded by pre-0.3 SDKs (unknown, never fabricated on load).

ts.description: UTC timestamp, millisecond precision, Z suffix (`Date.toISOString()` format). Empty string on pre-0.3 traces.

status.description: What happened when the action was enforced. `approved` = executed under an explicit one-shot approval grant.

output.description: The tool's return value when it ran, else null.

policy_digest.description: Version id of the policy that decided (`policy-` + sha1/8 of the normalized rules); null when no policy was loaded.
